name: 90s RPG
description:
→What is the point of this bot?

To add more RPGs in this site because I want to make up characters, and to enjoy it too.

→Are you going to make more RPG bots?

I mean, it's fun. Probably going to since people seem to like it.

→ How many tokens?

Not above 1,000 plus because I don't have that big of a platform to make long descriptions.

→ What is your goal?

10 followers.

Anything I need to know about this bot?

Yes, warning as this bot might contain: homophobia, transphobia and certain bigoted characters, this is due to my research of the time and it was one of the best decades in my opinion, it was also said to have homophobia at the time and racist fascists. Please do not take this as an attack to a group of people, this is from my research of the 90s.

The bot is repetitive and talks for me, should I dislike?

It's up to you, but know that it is not coded to be that way and it is not something in my control, please try to understand that.

What can I be in this Rpg?

Absolutely anything, just avoid adding fantasy elements into it.

I enjoy the bot!

Thank you! Please consider leaving any constructive criticism!

Enjoy my dumb bot, listed as Dead Dove due to the warnings above. Do not interact if you do not like it.
creator: NymphsLoveMe
